title: Tool Ponies!
description: Ponify your minecraft tools with this name dependent texture pack!
body:
![Tool Ponies Long Image](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/ZalE4i4d/images/40bd80d046e75ecea997aa1ff74ef78d0e95e5d6.png) ### Ponify your minecraft tools with this name dependent texture pack!

**Requried [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home) or [CIT Resewn (for Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) in order for this texture pack to work!** ## My Little Pony Character Available: **G4 Characters:** 1. Twilight Sparkle 1. Pinkie Pie 1. Rainbow Dash 1. Applejack 1. Rarity 1. Fluttershy 1. Derpy Hooves 1. Starlight Glimmer

**G5 Characters:** 1. Sunny Starscout 1. Hitch Trailblazer 1. Izzy Moonbow 1. Zipp Storm 1. Pipp Petals

![Tool Ponies GIF Showcase](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1130083968629354587/1130445372817420318/Tool_Ponies_Mini_Showcase.gif)
(above should be the GIF Showcase of Tool Ponies. if it not loaded, click [here](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1130083968629354587/1130445372817420318/Tool_Ponies_Mini_Showcase.gif)) ## YouTube Video Showcase:
### https://youtu.be/IF13EB0yLOI

The My Little Pony Franchise, owned by Hasbro, has inspired me to create this fan-made texture pack.
